weatherTemplate1:
1) Short one liner
%descemoji-today% %conditions-today% • High: %tempmax-today%° • Avg: %tempavg-today%° • Low: %tempmin-today%°
Feels Like Max: %feelslikemax-today%° • Avg: %feelslikeavg-today%° • Low: %feelslikemin-today%°
☀️ ⬆️ %sunrise-today% • ⬇️ %sunset-today%
weatherTemplate2:
2) More detailed
%address%: %dow2-now% %month4-now% %date1-now% - %hours12-now%:%mins-now% %ampm2-now%
Probability of precipitation: %precipprob% • (%preciptype%)
Current Temp: %temp%°C • Feels Like: %feelslike%°C
Wind: %windspeed% km/h from the %winddirstr% with gusts up to %windgust% km/h
Sunrise: %sunrise% • Sunset: %sunset%
weatherTemplate3: 3) Historical DIV  %month4-now% %date1-now% %year1-now% • %hours12-now%:%mins-now% %ampm2-now% • %conditions%  Recorded Temp: %temp% • Felt like: %feelslike%  Wind: %windspeed% km/h from the %winddirstr% with gusts up to %windgust% km/h  Sunrise: %sunrise% • Sunset: %sunset%
weatherTemplate4: 4) Current DIV  %month4-now% %date1-now% %year1-now% • %hours12-now%:%mins-now% %ampm2-now% • %conditions%  Current Temp: %temp% • Feels like: %feelslike%  Wind: %windspeed% km/h from the %winddirstr% with gusts up to %windgust% km/h  Sunrise: %sunrise% • Sunset: %sunset%
